de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class AbstractUpdateExtractor.NodeGoal

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.AbstractUpdateExtractor.NodeGoal
  • Enclosing class:
    AbstractUpdateExtractor

    protected static class AbstractUpdateExtractor.NodeGoal
extends java.lang.Object
    Utility class used by AbstractUpdateExtractor#computeValueConditions(Set, Map). Instances of this class store the current Node and the Goals at which backward iteration on parents has started.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      NodeGoal(Goal goal)
      Constructor.
      NodeGoal(Node currentNode, ImmutableList<Goal> startingGoals)
      A reached child node during backward iteration.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Node getCurrentNode()
      Returns the current Node.
      Node getParent()
      Returns the parent of getCurrentNode().
      int getSerialNr()
      Returns the serial number of getCurrentNode().
      ImmutableList<Goal> getStartingGoals()
      Returns the Goals at which backward iteration has started.
      java.lang.String toString()
